violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: subtraction-underflow
; LINE: 36
; VIOLATION: Subtraction Underflow at releaseStock
(declare-const reserved Int)
(declare-const quantity Int)
(declare-const result Int)
(assert (= result (- reserved quantity)))
(assert (>= reserved 0))
(assert (>= quantity 0))
(assert (> quantity reserved))
(assert (< result 0))
(check-sat)
violations.witness:
(
  (define-fun quantity () Int
    1)
  (define-fun result () Int
    (- 1))
  (define-fun reserved () Int
    0)
)
violations.judge_note: cegar-confirmed: A caller invoking `releaseStock(productId, 1)` when `db.getReserved(productId)` returns `0` (e.g., due to a double-release or a race condition) will compute `reserved - quantity = -1`, driving the res
